name: com.deucarian.template.game.movement-fps
description: Starter Unity game template for a movement-FPS horde arena slice with local wallrunner movement and clean Deucarian combat/upgrade adapters.

samples.description: A playable slice with WallrunnerMotor movement, hitscan and projectile gunplay, autonomous powers, horde escalation, miniboss victory flow, XP pickups, a simple level-up draft, and restart flow.
